welcome.greeting_prefix: Hi. We’re happy to see you on

dispute.title: Open a dispute
dispute.intro: If you and your counterparty disagree on whether the deal was fulfilled, you can escalate to a jury of arbitrators. Each arbitrator votes; the majority decision releases or refunds the funds.
dispute.evidence_hint: PDF, JPG or PNG · 10 MB max
dispute.reason_placeholder: Describe the dispute in a few sentences.
dispute.stub_banner_description: This screen is a visual preview. The escrow canister doesn't yet expose a Disputed lifecycle / jury voting API; nothing is sent to the chain.

detail.title: Deal {id}
detail.not_found: We couldn't find this deal under your principal.

profile.title: Profile
profile.role_stub_hint: Arbitrator and Admin roles will land in a future release.
profile.role_arbitrator_description: When the dispute jury lands, this is where you'll vote on disputed deals, see your weight, and earn rewards.
profile.role_admin_description: Operational controls for canister-wide settings, fee policies, and arbitrator onboarding will live here.
profile.edit_disabled_hint: Profile editing will land once user metadata moves on-chain.

logout_confirm.title: Sign out?
logout_confirm.description: We'll clear your local session. Your deals stay on chain — sign back in to access them.

send.title: Send
send.coming_soon_description: Direct send / receive lands in a future release. For now, use the deal flow on the home tab.

deals.empty_description: Create your first escrow deal to lock funds against a recipient or share a tip link.

actions.dispute_tooltip: Dispute resolution will land in a future canister upgrade.
actions.dispute_notice_html: Dispute resolution is on the roadmap. The escrow canister does not yet support a Disputed state — track progress in the escrow repo.

create.title: Create a deal
create.recipient_placeholder: Leave empty for a tip / share-link flow
create.expiry_invalid: Expiry must be in the future.
create.votes_disabled_hint: Dispute jury voting will land in a future canister upgrade.

share.title: Share your deal
share.description: Send this link or QR code to the recipient. They can claim the funds at any time before the deal expires.
share.no_share_needed: This deal has a known recipient — no share link is needed.
share.qr_alt: QR code linking to the claim page

claim.title: Claim your deal
claim.missing_code: No claim code in the URL — if this deal is bound to your principal you can still accept it; otherwise ask the sender for the full link.
claim.signin_description: PandaMe needs to know your principal before it can release the funds to you.
claim.settled_description: The funds have been released to your principal.
